theme_rankings.why_now: HBM4·CoWoS·EUV 모두 캐파 부족 지속. 2027까지 수요 가시성 확보된 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 정점 논쟁 + 중국 수출 규제 변동성. 어닝 미스 시 30% 낙폭 흔함.

theme_rankings.why_now: 강한 추세장에서만 사용. 분할매수 + 손절선 명확히 + 자산의 5~10% 이하.
theme_rankings.risk: 장기 보유 ❌. 횡보·하락장에선 음의 복리(volatility decay)로 손실 누적.

theme_rankings.why_now: MSFT·GOOG·META·AMZN 2026 Capex 합계 $400B+. AI 매출 회수 본격화 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 광고·소비 둔화 시 Capex 가이던스 컷 가능. 빅테크 동반 변동성.

theme_rankings.why_now: AI가 돌아가려면 전기 필요. 미국 변압기 대기 100주+ → 만드는 회사들 5년치 일감 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: 사이클 후반 진입 우려는 아직 작지만, 금리 급등 시 인프라주 동반 조정.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🚂 AI의 '밴더빌트' — 실제 업무에 AI 박는 운영자
theme_rankings.why_now: 추론 비용 90% 하락 + 엔터프라이즈 도입 본격. 진짜 텐베거 후보가 여기서 다수.
theme_rankings.risk: 밸류에이션 과열. 매출 성장 30%+ 못 보이면 멀티플 압축.

theme_rankings.why_now: 인지노동 다음은 물리노동. 2027~2030 진정한 텐베거 가능 영역.
theme_rankings.risk: 상용화 시점 불확실. 미래 옵션밸류 비중 큼. 변동성 극심.

narrative.summary: Talen Energy: 정량 종합 72점, 라벨 ACCUMULATE. 단기 65 / 중기 74 / 장기 74. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 약과열
overheat.guidance: 분할매수만. 한 번에 들어가지 말고 1/3~1/2씩 나눠서.

guidance.basis: ATR(14) 5.0% → 2-ATR 손절폭 10.0%. 포트폴리오의 1%만 risk-on (1번 손절 = 자산 1% 손실).

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 2개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA, 일봉 200MA. 현재가 대비 +15.0% 위치. T1 $450.6 (R:R 2.4)
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $370.7 아래 손절가 $336.6 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

top_news.title: Elliott, SVP Buy Braskem Debt Amid Restructuring Talks
top_news.summary: Elliott Investment Management LP and SVP Global have recently bought debt of Braskem SA, the Brazilian petrochemical producer rushing to get creditors to agree to a restructuring plan, according to people familiar with the matter.

top_news.title: Oil Set for Deep Weekly Loss as Hormuz Traffic Starts to Pick Up
top_news.summary: Oil headed for a substantial weekly drop as the US-Iran interim peace deal saw shipping through the Strait of Hormuz start to return to normal, easing the global crude market’s biggest ever supply shock.

top_news.title: KPMG Australia Scandal Heats Up With Reckoning in Parliament
top_news.summary: KPMG Australia is set for a public reckoning as lawmakers demand information and changes in an industry beset by a series of scandals around the misuse of confidential client information.

top_news.title: Standard Nuclear Files for US IPO In Reactor Fuel Push
top_news.summary: Standard Nuclear Inc., a maker of fuel for nuclear reactors, filed for an initial public offering as the power needs to fund the artificial intelligence boom continue to grow.

top_news.title: Stocks Climb as US-Iran Deal Eases Inflation Angst: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Wall Street staged a comeback that saw stocks joining bonds higher after a peace deal between the US and Iran spurred optimism that a revival of the Strait of Hormuz will ease inflation risks.

top_news.title: Schwab Warns of Margin Calls as Concerns Over Tax Bets Mount
top_news.summary: Charles Schwab Corp. is imposing new margin requirements for clients using long-short investment strategies, adding more guardrails around a fast-growing tax-management trade.

top_news.title: The Knicks Win! So Do New York City, Big Merch And The NBA
top_news.summary: The New York Knicks weren’t the only big winners of this year’s NBA finals. On today’s Big Take podcast, Jason Kelly and Randall Williams tell Sarah Holder what the series means for the league’s bottom line, New York’s economy and Jalen Brunson’s future as a pitchman. Listen wherever you get your podcasts.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Intel Rallies to Record After Trump Touts Apple Chip Deal
top_news.summary: Intel Corp.’s stock surged Thursday after US President Donald Trump said the chipmaker will work with Apple Inc. to design and produce semiconductors domestically.

top_news.title: Bitcoin Falls Back Toward $60,000 on Strategy Shares, Rate Fears
top_news.summary: Bitcoin extended its slide back toward the $60,000 level. The decline is driven by mounting concerns over the unraveling of Strategy Inc.’s funding mechanism, alongside rate-hike fears that are dampening demand for riskier assets.

top_news.title: July Fed Rate-Hike Wagers Drive Bond Futures Volume Surge
top_news.summary: The Treasury market saw a record surge in futures trading that underpins bets that the Federal Reserve’s next move will be to boost interest rates.
